title: Become an AI Native Cloud Engineer
summary: AWS Developers argues that junior cloud engineers should focus on fundamentals like security, reliability, cost, and maintainability rather than coding alone, as AI agents can now generate infrastructure code. The video emphasizes understanding what to build and why, with input from Marc Brooker, a Distinguished Engineer at AWS.
